message:
perf(network): use BufReader for /proc/net/* parsing

Convert from read_to_string to BufReader for parsing /proc/net/tcp,
/proc/net/udp, and /proc/net/unix. This reduces memory usage for
systems with many network connections by avoiding loading entire
files into memory.

- Add parse_proc_net_*_reader functions that take BufRead
- Update parse_proc_net_* functions to use BufReader
- Refactor _content functions to delegate to reader versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
